items.title: Man charged with the murder of missing mum Jana Armstrong after body found

children.content: A 48-year-old man has been charged with murder after the body of missing mother Jana Armstrong was found in bushland late on Saturday.

gallery.altText: A woman lovingly holds a small baby

thumbnail.altText: A woman lovingly holds a small baby

items.title: The man solving the '100-million-year-old cold case' death of a dinosaur

children.content: Travis Enright is four months into investigating what he calls "a 100-million-year-old cold case" involving a 10-metre-long aquatic dinosaur called Moria.

image.altText: A man holding up a fossil bone.

items.title: Australian veterans say government will 'delay, deny until we all die'

children.content: It's been more than 50 years since Rifle Company Butterworth was deployed to protect Australia's air base overseas, yet they are still battling for recognition.

image.altText: SC veteran graeme

items.title: How WWI helped shape what you call this deli meat

children.content: The words we use for a handful of classic Australian foods can tell a lot about where we come from.

gallery.altText: Black and white image of a roll of deli meat called polony

thumbnail.altText: Black and white image of a roll of deli meat called polony

items.title: What falling home prices mean for affordability

children.content: Australian house prices have recorded their biggest monthly fall since 2022. For young buyers hoping it's a turning point, economists have some bad news.

image.altText: A young woman wearing glasses and a dress with a phone in her hand in front of a graphic of a home with 'for sale' behind it

items.title: Police lock down lifted following gunshot reports

children.content: Police declared a public emergency after shots were reportedly fired at a property in Emu Park, central Queensland.

image.altText: Police tape in the foreground with trees and car in the background

items.title: 'Healing from trauma': The fashion show not about the dresses

children.content: Esperance Nyirabarahinyuza survived trauma and losing family. Now, she is helping more than 100 refugee and migrant women in Logan rediscover confidence, community and belonging, one conversation at a time.

image.altText: a woman walks down a fashion runway in traditional african clothing

items.title: Adrenaline junkie 89yo skydives to celebrate his birthday

children.content: Donald isn't alone in chasing thrills at an older age, with data from SkyDive Australia showing more than 14,000 people over 50 have dived since 2023.

image.altText: a selfie of an older man skydiving, he is grinning into the camera

items.title: Legacy of an outback artist who created masterpieces with his teeth

children.content: Left quadriplegic in an accident, every line the late Gunggari man drew and every word he scrawled in ink was created without a pen in his hands.

gallery.altText: A young person points to some art on a wall, watched by a family.

thumbnail.altText: A young person points to some art on a wall, watched by a family.

items.title: Outback towns welcome grey nomads after slow start to tourism season

children.content: Grey nomads are giving a much-needed boost to outback Queensland towns over the winter tourism season, but locals say more visitors are needed to fuel economic growth.

image.altText: Two grey nomads stand in front of a caravan in Mount Isa and smile. They have their arms around each other.

items.title: Brisbane Airport flight paths altered following noise review

children.content: People living in areas such as Redcliffe, southern Moreton Bay, Bribie Island and Logan are set to benefit the most, but there will be no change to the flight path over Bulimba.

image.altText: A qantas plane taking off into a clear blue sky with a city skyline at the bottom in the distance

items.title: Six-year-old boy dies in hospital after Scenic Rim crash

children.content: A six-year-old boy has died in hospital following a two-vehicle crash near Beaudesert on Monday.

image.altText: Police on the scene at a crash at an intersection with one car damaged.

items.title: The small changes that can make a big difference for renters like Bernadette

children.content: About one in three Queenslanders with disability surveyed say they lived in a home that didn't meet their needs last year, a report says.

image.altText: A woman with short black hair wearing a green top

items.title: Man accused of child sex offences after travelling with teenagers on trains

children.content: Police allege the man approached two girls on two separate occasions before travelling with them to Deception Bay by train.

gallery.altText: Two police officers standing on a train with their backs to the camera.

thumbnail.altText: Two police officers standing on a train with their backs to the camera.

items.title: Roundabout for fatal Bruce Highway intersection

children.content: The Queensland government will build a four-lane roundabout at a Bruce Highway intersection that claimed three lives.

image.altText: A drone shot shows five vehicles involved in a highway crash.

items.title: McKeown 'gutted' as illness forces Commonwealth Games withdrawal

children.content: Kaylee McKeown withdraws from the Commonwealth Games after glandular fever causes shortness of breath and a loss of appetite.

image.altText: Kaylee McKeown looks to her left at the wall after a swimming race in Brisbane in 2025.

items.title: Historic tractors arrive at outback's 800-metre long Machinery Mile

children.content: Ilfracombe's roadside museum is almost as long as the town itself and enshrines machines from Australia's past. Locals are preparing to display the latest donation of four historic tractors.

image.altText: man smiles leaning against small yellow tractor

items.title: Proposed laws to extend maximum detention to 72 hours for mental health check

children.content: The legislation would allow Queensland's chief psychiatrist to extend the maximum detention for a person accused of a serious crime from 24 to 72 hours.

image.altText: Handcuffed to hospital bed generic

items.title: Boy charged with extremist offence 'wanted to kill people for months'

children.content: According to court documents, the 13-year-old told police he had planned mass murder for many months, had been inspired by other school shooters and massacres.

gallery.altText: A BP service station pictured at night.

thumbnail.altText: A BP service station pictured at night.

items.title: Driving lessons open up new world for refugees in Toowoomba

children.content: Learning to drive is helping refugees leave the problems of isolation and difficulty accessing opportunities in the rear-view mirror in Toowoomba.

image.altText: two people inside a car

items.title: Gold Coast most expensive rental market but with 'wide spectrum' of prices

children.content: Real estate experts say the Gold Coast's high concentration of luxury housing and persistent shortages in new construction are sustaining upward pressure on rentals.

image.altText: Two people lay on a hill overlooking a Gold Coast beach.

items.title: Developer plans to demolish and rebuild Brisbane's Wintergarden mall

children.content: Developer IFM has submitted plans to demolish the "fragmented" interior of a Queen Street Mall shopping centre and replace it with two levels of shops.

image.altText: The exterior of a shopping centre.

items.title: Qld police check on 21 Triple Zero callers after Telstra outage

children.content: Queensland police confirmed multiple emergency calls across the state failed to connect to Triple Zero during the nationwide Telstra outage.

image.altText: A person holding a phone calling emergency services

items.title: Artists warned to 'be prepared to make a stand' against AI

children.content: Country-folk musician Jeanette Wormald was shocked when she found a fake AI-generated website "tribute" to her, in place of a site she thought had lapsed. But then she found disputes over her copyright on her music.

items.title: Gout Gout ruled out of World Under-20 athletics titles after training injury

children.content: Australian athletics star Gout Gout is ruled out of this year's World Under-20 titles in Oregon after a training injury in Brisbane.

image.altText: Gout Gout competing at 2025/26 Australian Athletics Championships in Sydney.

items.title: Man who dissolved wife's body in acid loses bid for earlier release

children.content: Klaus Andres was sentenced to life in prison in 2013 after he was found guilty of murdering his 42-year-old wife Li Ping Cao.

image.altText: Li Ping Cao from Cairns in far north Queensland

items.title: Queensland records the most fatal motorcycle accidents in the country

children.content: Police say they've seen a rise in anti-social hooning behaviour as Queensland records a rise in fatal motorcycle crashes.

image.altText: An aerial shot of an overturned motorcycle on a road bend

items.title: Jake answers the call and saddles up for ride of a lifetime

children.content: "A mate rang me up and said, 'Do you want to have a go?'" That's all it took to get Jake Callagan in the saddle for the Jundah Camel races. The novice camel jockey took to it well, with a swag of blue, red and green ribbons to take home.

image.altText: man standing in front of camels
